chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 08 of 2009 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.926/2010. 2. For hearing of Main Petition. 07.04.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Atif Hafeez, Advocate for the Respondent.......... This matter has remained pending for over 15 years without any significant progress. Even previous order dated 31.10.2019 shows that the Petitioner’s counsel was put on notice and was held that no further time ought to be granted. Today, six years later still none has appeared on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. This JCM stands dismissed accordingly with listed application. J U D G E Ayaz
